metadata.name: Talent Angels seed graph
metadata.description: Small local graph that demonstrates Locator, Connector, Pathfinder, and Learning Token planning over skills, tasks, occupations, and frameworks.

nodes.label: Data analysis
nodes.description: Inspect, clean, transform, and model data to discover useful information for decision-making.

nodes.label: Knowledge graphs
nodes.description: Represent entities and relationships as a graph for search, reasoning, and semantic interoperability.

nodes.label: Prompt engineering
nodes.description: Design instructions, context, and evaluation criteria for reliable AI assistant behavior.

nodes.label: Python programming
nodes.description: Use Python to automate workflows, manipulate data, and build services or analysis tools.

nodes.label: Graph search
nodes.description: Traverse graph structures with algorithms such as breadth-first search and shortest path discovery.

nodes.label: Data modelling and design
nodes.description: Develop models and data structures that meet business, analytics, and interoperability needs.

nodes.label: Machine learning
nodes.description: Develop systems that learn patterns from data and support prediction, classification, or recommendation.

nodes.label: Collect and validate data
nodes.description: Gather, validate, and prepare data from multiple sources for analysis.

nodes.label: Build an ontology
nodes.description: Define entities, relationships, and controlled vocabulary for a knowledge domain.

nodes.label: Evaluate AI agent behavior
nodes.description: Test an AI agent against expected workflows, safety constraints, and output quality metrics.

nodes.label: Data Scientist
nodes.description: Develop and implement analytical methods, machine learning models, and data products.

nodes.label: Software Developer
nodes.description: Design, build, test, and maintain software systems and applications.

nodes.label: AI Graph Agents course
nodes.description: A learning path that teaches graph modeling, locator/connector/pathfinder agents, and tokenizable assessment.

nodes.label: Pathfinder project assessment
nodes.description: Project evidence that a learner can trace routes between skill and occupation nodes.

nodes.label: Ontology mapping assessment
nodes.description: Project evidence that a learner can map terms across skills, tasks, occupations, and frameworks.

edges.evidence: Python is commonly used to automate data preparation and validation.
Data analysis requires validated source data.
Ontology work depends on data modeling and schema design.
Prompt design is evaluated through agent behavior.
Data scientists collect and validate data before modeling.
Machine learning is a core data science competency.
Software developers use programming languages such as Python.
Modern software developers increasingly evaluate AI-assisted workflows.
The course teaches graph representations for talent ontologies.
The course teaches graph traversal for Connector and Pathfinder workflows.
Ontology mapping assessment proves knowledge graph competency.
Pathfinder project proves graph search competency.
Graph modeling comes before graph traversal in a learning journey.
Graph traversal helps inspect ontology neighborhoods.
